title: MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd:
MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
